---
name: twn-content-miner
description: Extract truthful technical and reflective content ideas from verified TWN work and learning.
---

# TWN Content Miner

Use real session logs, decisions, experiments, errors, tests, implementation,
and Vanessa's reflections.

Generate LinkedIn, TikTok, article, carousel, and notebook ideas. Include the
evidence, technical lesson, reflective angle, claim boundaries, and publication
readiness.

Never invent metrics, feedback, milestones, expertise, or outcomes.
